meta.title: WFA post-run audit (prove what actually ran) + package results
constraints: read-only inspection only; may create NEW report files only
do not print or log secrets
prefer deterministic evidence: timestamps, CPU time, file mtimes, logs

tasks.title: Prove last run actually executed (not fake DONE)
acceptance: Collect evidence of real compute: CPU time, process history, log timelines
If evidence contradicts 'run happened', clearly state why
steps: On VPS: confirm sentinel exists and capture mtime + contents: /opt/coint4/coint4/outputs/WFA_RUN_DONE.txt
On VPS: find newest run_queue.watch.log ending near sentinel; capture last 20 lines
On VPS: summarize run_queue.csv completion counts for the window used previously (start=2026-02-13T07:28:51Z end=sentinel mtime)
On VPS: prove compute happened using at least TWO independent signals:
A) sum CPU time for relevant processes from logs if available (run_queue.watch.log contains CPU stats) OR
B) use OS accounting: journalctl (if enabled), /var/log/sysstat/sar* (if present), or /var/log/sa/sa* to show CPU usage bands during the run window
C) check mtime distribution of equity_curve.csv across a random sample of 30 completed runs; mtimes clustered in the run window = good sign
If sar/sysstat unavailable, use /proc/stat snapshots are not historical; then rely on log CPU lines + mtime clustering as primary proof

tasks.title: Confirm sharpe_ratio_abs is canonical Sharpe implementation
acceptance: Point to exact code lines generating sharpe_ratio_abs in strategy_metrics.csv
Demonstrate lightweight re-check for TOP-5 using equity_curve.csv without rewriting artifacts
steps: On VPS: locate generator of strategy_metrics.csv in src/coint2/pipeline/walk_forward_orchestrator.py and capture the exact line where sharpe_abs is assigned
On VPS: locate performance.sharpe_ratio implementation in src/coint2/core/performance.py and show it calls annualized_sharpe_ratio from src/coint2/core/sharpe.py
Run a small read-only script to recompute canonical Sharpe from equity_curve.csv for TOP-5 runs and show diffs are near-zero

tasks.title: Generate single Markdown post-run report (DONE + metrics + anomalies)
acceptance: One Markdown file created locally (gitignored) with required sections
Includes: DONE evidence, where results live, TOP-3 Sharpe & TOP-3 PnL, duplicate-metrics note, 8 missing results_dir rows with mapping
steps: Write report to: coint4/outputs/post_run/wfa_postrun_audit_20260215.md (local repo path on this machine OR /opt/coint4/coint4/... if writing on VPS is preferred)
Include completion statement completed=614/614 with the exact window definition used
Include the 8 rows where results_dir doesn't exist and map each to the real existing directory

tasks.title: Build fresh run_index_canonical CSV for completed runs (no reruns)
acceptance: CSV placed next to existing rollup without deleting anything
Uses canonical Sharpe when equity_curve.csv exists; also keep raw Sharpe column
steps: Read completed rows from run_queue.csv for the same window and resolve known results_dir mismatches via a mapping table
For each run: read strategy_metrics.csv; compute canonical Sharpe from equity_curve.csv when present; write CSV to artifacts/wfa/aggregate/rollup/run_index_canonical_<stamp>.csv
